title: Planning for Effective NSF Award Management — D-RED Seminar Slides (Rankins)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-10-09 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Planning for Effective NSF Award Management', presented by Claudia Rankins, PhD (PRISSEM Academic Services, LLC). Walks PIs through post-award management of NSF grants, including reporting, prior approvals, and effective project administration. Zoom recording: https://morganstate.zoom.us/rec/share/fsV_sc8d2SZYRcnHCIAdYTrrX4izi3Vvi3tpBuAUVf-ICqQqkRAjrsO6oo7qedVQ.nRf47KmB0eRO_yZX
